General Guidelines: Content must be brand-safe and strictly adhere to NeuroVibe AI's visual identity. The brand voice is empathetic, precise, and innovative. Our communications should feel like a natural extension of human intuition, much like the technology we build. Not all images contain NeuroVibe AI logos. But when present, they should adhere to NeuroVibe AI's brand guidelines.
Primary Color Palette: The primary palette consists of colors most instantly recognizable as NeuroVibe AI. These specific HEX values must be used: Neuro Blue (#0A2540) and Cognitive White (#FFFFFF). These color codes or names should not appear as text in the resulting images. For example, a literal mention of 'Neuro Blue' or '#0A2540' on any object or subject or background in the generated image is a violation of the policy.
Accent Color Palette: Vibe Electric (#00D2FF) is used for accents, buttons, and the secondary logo. Neural Grey (#8A9AAB) is used for secondary text and borders. These color codes or names should not appear as text in the resulting images. For example, a literal mention of 'Vibe Electric' or '#00D2FF' on any object, subject or background in the generated image is a violation of the policy.
Logo Specifications - Primary Logo: The primary logo lockup communicates our full identity and should maintain clear visibility and contrast. Use Cognitive White for standard backgrounds and Neuro Blue for dark backgrounds. Avoid placing the primary logo on Vibe Electric to ensure the 'AI' portion of the text remains legible.
Logo Specifications - Secondary Logo: The Pulse Arrow is the secondary standalone icon. It represents a heartbeat and forward momentum, symbolizing the seamless integration of human life and technology. It should primarily appear in the Vibe Electric color. Approved variations include the Pulse on Cognitive White, Pulse on Neuro Blue, and a Dark Pulse on Vibe Electric.
Brand Prohibitions (Strict Don'ts): Strictly prohibited actions for AI generation: To maintain brand integrity, never alter the structural relationship, core proportions, or colors of the logo. Do not use unapproved colors. Do not stretch the logo. Do not clutter the clear space (e.g., placing text over the logo). Do not make logos partially transparent. Do not crop off edges of the logos.
Logo placement Restrictions: For Social Media Layout, the Pulse Arrow should serve as the avatar, and the Primary Logo should be used to anchor graphical content within the image. Ensure the clear space around logos is uncluttered.
Image Specifications and Guidelines: Images should have a premium, high-quality appearance and be appropriate for all audiences. Digital content should balance clean typography with strategic uses of Vibe Electric and Neuro Blue. Primary subjects or objects should always be shown in full and not cropped.
Text Specifications and Guidelines: We utilize universally supported web-safe fonts. Primary Font (Headings): Helvetica-Bold, which conveys modern architectural form, clarity, and strength. Secondary Font (Body Text): Times-Roman, evoking classic reliability and legibility. Pitch Deck Slides: Use Cognitive White background, Helvetica-Bold titles in Neuro Blue, bullet points in Times-Roman in Neural Grey.
Safe Zones: Keep areas free of important content to prevent cropping. For primary logo or Pulse Arrow usage, ensure the edges are never cropped and clear space isn't cluttered.
Composition Styles: Ensure high contrast. Use Cognitive White for standard backgrounds and Neuro Blue for dark backgrounds. Web Banners should command attention using a solid Neuro Blue background combined with bold Helvetica typography for headings. Use Vibe Electric to highlight call-to-action buttons or key statistics.
Trade Mark Specifications: There should be no trade mark symbols in the image. For example, if there is a primary logo or Pulse Arrow, there SHOULD NOT be any Trademark symbol '™' (UTF-8 code:™), Registered Trademark symbol '®' (UTF-8 code:®), Copyright symbol '©' (UTF-8 code:©), or any other trade mark symbols adjacent to them. LOOK CRITICALLY around logos for any trade mark symbols.
